steps.title: Identify the chronological sequence
steps.content: The passage spans from 1585 to 1591 to 1596, marking Shakespeare's career milestones. The signal is forward movement in time.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
The logical relationship is sequence. The blank needs a transition signaling forward movement in time.
  • Choice A — "In other words,": signals restatement or clarification of the same idea, so fails. ✗
  • Choice B — "Conversely,": signals direct contrast or opposition, so fails. ✗
  • Choice C — "Thus,": signals logical consequence, requiring a cause–effect link that isn't present here, so fails. ✗
  • Choice D — "Later,": signals temporal progression from 1591 to 1596, so fits. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
